name: ai-powered-e-channeling-root
description: Root project for AI-Powered E-Channeling (my-app branch)

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix web"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix web" "npm start --prefix mobile"
scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix web && npm install --prefix mobile
